theoremName: augmented repair closed-form transport limit theorem

transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

abstractLimitPrinciple.coreSpaces: finite trace-image subspaces V_N inside the smooth lifted core
abstractLimitPrinciple.limsup: graph-form recovery sequences preserve R_aug coordinates
abstractLimitPrinciple.liminf: bounded repaired-form energy has weak graph-form subsequential limits
abstractLimitPrinciple.traceLimit: R_aug,N f_N -> R_aug f in the transported graph-dual topology
abstractLimitPrinciple.conclusion: the closed lower-semicontinuous envelope is nonnegative

finiteSchurConsequenceInputStatus.label: finite Schur repair consequence packaged input
finiteSchurConsequenceInputStatus.reason: The D_aug representation theorem packages the finite Schur repair constants and finite repaired-form positivity.

moscoGraphFormConvergenceStatus.label: Mosco graph-form convergence
moscoGraphFormConvergenceStatus.reason: The D_aug representation theorem packages the Mosco quotient/LSC passage, the nonnegative completed form, and the trace-side representation.

augmentedTraceStrongGraphDualConvergence.label: augmented trace strong graph-dual convergence
augmentedTraceStrongGraphDualConvergence.reason: Strong graph-dual trace convergence is imported through the closed-form limit theorem's quotient compatibility chain.

finiteRepairsClosedFormLimitStatus.label: finite repairs have a closed-form nonnegative limit
finiteRepairsClosedFormLimitStatus.reason: The finite nonnegative repaired forms are compatible with the graph-form recovery and compactness statements. Lower semicontinuity therefore gives a nonnegative closed-form limit represented on the completed quotient trace space.

positiveTailCompatibilityStatus.label: positive Volterra tail compatibility
positiveTailCompatibilityStatus.reason: The positive Volterra tail theorem supplies the diagonal tail nonnegativity required by the completed repaired form.

DaugTransportLimitStatus.label: D_aug nonnegative transport limit
DaugTransportLimitStatus.reason: The representation theorem defines a bounded self-adjoint nonnegative trace-side repair form D_aug on X_aug.

repairedAugmentedFormLimitStatus.label: repaired augmented form limit
repairedAugmentedFormLimitStatus.reason: K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug is the closed lower-semicontinuous limit of finite nonnegative repaired forms, hence is nonnegative on the completed trace-fiber domain.

proof: Use the D_aug trace-form representation theorem for the completed nonnegative repair on X_aug.
Use the positive Volterra tail theorem for the remaining nonnegative tail input.
Conclude the repaired augmented form is nonnegative on the completed trace-fiber domain.
